name: dynos-work
description: Autonomous Software Foundry. Human-directed, tool-grounded, self-improving. Plans, executes, audits, repairs, and calibrates to your project over time.

interface.shortDescription: Human-directed software foundry for planned, audited code work.
interface.longDescription: dynos-work turns a task into a scoped spec, reviewed plan, parallel execution, independent audit, repair loop, and learned prevention rules without changing the human approval gates.
defaultPrompt: Start a dynos-work task for this repo.
Audit and repair the current dynos-work task.
